'''thahuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngana|ngana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngana|ngana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thahuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæhiyith|thæhiyith]] || [[word:thæhiyij|thæhiyij]] || [[word:thæhiyish|thæhiyish]] || [[word:thæhiyi|thæhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thahuhuyuth|thahuhuyuth]] || [[word:thahuhuyuj|thahuhuyuj]] || [[word:thahuhuyush|thahuhuyush]] || [[word:thahuhuyu|thahuhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahuyuth|thahuyuth]] || [[word:thahuyuj|thahuyuj]] || [[word:thahuyush|thahuyush]] || [[word:thahuyu|thahuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahufyuth|thahufyuth]] || [[word:thahufyuj|thahufyuj]] || [[word:thahufyush|thahufyush]] || [[word:thahufyuf|thahufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thahuyuthu|thahuyuthu]] || [[word:thahuyuju|thahuyuju]] || [[word:thahuyushu|thahuyushu]] || [[word:thahuyuku|thahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thahuyuth|thahuyuth]] || [[word:thahuyuj|thahuyuj]] || [[word:thahuyush|thahuyush]] || [[word:thahuyu|thahuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thahuyuthul|thahuyuthul]] || [[word:thahuyujul|thahuyujul]] || [[word:thahuyushul|thahuyushul]] || [[word:thahuyukul|thahuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thahuyuthuthu|thahuyuthuthu]] || [[word:thahuyujuju|thahuyujuju]] || [[word:thahuyushushu|thahuyushushu]] || [[word:thahuyuku|thahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thahuyuthun|thahuyuthun]] || [[word:thahuyujun|thahuyujun]] || [[word:thahuyushun|thahuyushun]] || [[word:thahuyukun|thahuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thahuyuthuoro|thahuyuthuoro]] || [[word:thahuyujuoro|thahuyujuoro]] || [[word:thahuyushuoro|thahuyushuoro]] || [[word:thahuyukuoro|thahuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
